  "findings": [
    "Non-approved foam sealant used where fire-rated sealant is required by code and submittals."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the non-compliant foam sealant completely from the penetrations.",
    "Clean the joint/penetration surfaces to ensure proper adhesion.",
    "Apply an approved, fire-rated sealant/firestopping material matching the tested assembly design."
  ],
  "rationale": "The use of standard or non-approved foam sealant instead of the specified fire-rated sealant violates fireblocking and draftstopping requirements under IRC R302 and commercial building codes. The material must be replaced with an approved fire-resistant joint system or sealant before the work can be closed out.",
  "references": [
    "IRC R302.11",
    "IRC R302.11.1"
  ]
}
